regional_cost_note: Plumbers in Palmerston North typically charge $80–$120/hr. Manawatu rates are competitive. Emergency callouts add $70–$120.

businesses.name: Fast Flow Plumbing Ltd
businesses.known_for: Certified plumbing, gasfitting and drainlaying across Horowhenua, Manawatu and Rangitikei; handles kitchens, bathrooms, roofing and appliance repair.

businesses.name: On Point Plumbing
businesses.known_for: Honest quotes and high-quality workmanship from a leaking tap through to a new home build; certified plumber, gasfitter and drainlayer.

businesses.name: James plumbing and Drainage
businesses.known_for: Qualified plumber and drainlayer with 20+ years experience; competitive rates for maintenance, drainage and hot water cylinder work.

businesses.name: McDonald Plumbing & Gas
businesses.known_for: Plumbing, gas fitting and drainlaying with a reputation for going the extra mile; serves Horowhenua, Manawatu and Whanganui.
